nameOfCommonIngredientsGlossary: Lactobacillus/Lysinibacillus/(Citrus Junos Fruit/Coix Lacryma-Jobi Ma-yuen Seed/Honeysuckle Flower/Kochia Scoparia Fruit/Scrophularia Buergeriana) Extract/Sucrose Ferment Extract Filtrate
chemicalDescription: Lactobacillus/Lysinibacillus/(Citrus Junos Fruit/Coix Lacryma-Jobi Ma-yuen Seed/Honeysuckle Flower/Kochia Scoparia Fruit/Scrophularia Buergeriana) Extract/Sucrose Ferment Extract Filtrate is a filtrate of the extract of the product obtained by the fermentation of an extract of the fruit of Citrus junos, the seeds of Coix lacryma-jobi ma-yuen, flowers of Lonicera caprifolium, the fruit of Kochia scoparia, the whole plant Scrophularia buergeriana and Sucrose by the microorganisms Lactobacillus and Lysinibacillus.
inciName: LACTOBACILLUS/LYSINIBACILLUS/(CITRUS JUNOS FRUIT/COIX LACRYMA-JOBI MA-YUEN SEED/HONEYSUCKLE FLOWER/KOCHIA SCOPARIA FRUIT/SCROPHULARIA BUERGERIANA) EXTRACT/SUCROSE FERMENT EXTRACT FILTRATE
